reviews.review_description: this app has been trash since day one. for a company to miss the boat on vr is a testimony to how awful netflix is, thank you netflix for being the reason why i torent everything including your own productions

Sad that the app is no longer suportet but also understandable since the app was neither from meta nor from netflix.

If you want to continue watching Nerflix on juest you'll have to watch in the browser or sideload a netflix apk (Quest is based on android).
Why have a app if it no longer functions and reroutes you to the browser. I hate this.

reviews.review_title: They took my room away from me
reviews.review_description: I cant find the option to use the full room scene on the quest
I’m going to keep it like this until you allow it on the meta-quest app, please.

How is it possible that Meta being as big and as popular as it is has such a broken UI. No options to permanently delete apps like this that are defunct. No ability to have a real Netflix app that works offline. The entire UI needs an overall in the ability to customize it. I'm also sick of having to hear any background sounds when I click out of an app or browser. Give us the ability to mute specific sounds. Think windows 95 level of customization when it comes to audio outputs. I'm honestly never this rough on reviews but it's terrible.
Can't watch it anymore on oculus 3

reviews.review_title: No possibility to watch Netflix anymore
reviews.review_description: No possibility anymore to watch Netflix on Quest 1 ! :-(
That’s
Why was quest 2 support removed???

This was one of my favorite apps why is it not supported anymore?
All it needed was to improve the quality of the video to 4K.
I really loved the Netflix app when it had a Christmas background with snowy mountains now it just doesn’t feel the same and I want it back

They really need to get rid of this because it’s no longer supported when it was supported, it was good
That’s why I give it two star 
￼
I have Quest 3S But WHY DOESN'T IT WORK!?!?!?!?!?!?!? Now i have to use broswer
Took forever to login and then says it is not supported on the Quest 3.

To start I want to acknowledge the other one star reviews one being the the person doesn't have the right account if you don't have to right account it's not going to that's not an issue with the app. And the other complaining about 480p what do you expect when you are us only using 30% of the desply. 

The real issue is the app was released for the gear vr and has not been updated since.  This means you can't adjust the screen size.  And there is no option to download load so it eats battery
I think it is perfect it looks like a movie theater

I just got a Quest 2 and this was one of the first apps I tried.  It keeps turning off my system after 10 mins or so. I hoping a reinstall fixes the problem.
Like some of the other comments here I wished I could orient the screen to be visible in the ceiling direction if I’m laying down. It would be cool if movies were downloadable so you didn’t need an internet connection to watch shows.

Netflix needs to step up their game. The app works fine, however, Amazon prime is setting the bar high. They allow you to change the screen size, have a higher quality picture, and darken the theater. Can’t wait for the app to improve. Until then, I’ll be turning to Amazon for my movie and show needs.
Please enable higher fidelity video. The current resolution doesn’t hit the mark.
Please make it at least 720p
I wish you could move the movie screen up to the ceiling to make it easy to watch a movie while lying down. if I wanted to watch a movie sitting up I would just use a regular tv.

This review would be five stars except you can’t cast to your phone to check in on what your kids are watching. I assume they do this for some vague copyright reason that was badly thought out and never made it past legal to someone who thought that parents like to keep an eye on what their kids are watching.

I mean, they can switch to a parent account if they feel like it! Maybe they’re watching Human Centipede instead of She-Ra, who can say?? If I could use this basic functionality of the Oculus, I could say, but Netflix decided that was too much trouble for them to bother.

So if you’re an adult using this alone: go for it, it’s a blast. If you’re a parent, stop now it’s a 
bad deal and Netflix would prefer you not use it.

reviews.review_title: Quest has to be part of household
reviews.review_description: You can travel with the quest - it is a personal device - why would you put the password sharing blocker on this, it’s not a real TV??
That is unaccepted!!!!
Screen, just in comparison with prime video be, it fails utterly.
I just received my quest 2 and so far this is my favorite thing to sit down and do on it.
Is good but where’s goofy grape.
480p is just not good enough. Word to Netflix: How about just unlocking the option to use the Oculus browser or Firefox Reality, if the app is of no interest to you?
Experience is awesome! But they should give more options for the layout. The living room is OK but a cinema with a darker room could also be an option. Audio is maxing!
Well I’ll give it a thumbs up I don’t see a problem.
Netflix is for 2D content. This app seamlessly displays it on a virtual TV in a virtual house, and it works amazingly
Good app, you can sign in and all, but there’s some bugs that need to be fixed when browsing. You can only use one controller which sucks.

As soon as I open the app I can’t use my controllers and my eyes act as my mouse sort of, so I can’t do anything. And when I try to exit by pressing the meta button, my universal menu doesn’t show up. So I am basically stuck in the app forever, which really sucks. I feel like I’ve tried everything. I tried turning my headset off and back on and trying to see if that would reset it and put me back in my home area. Nothing. I looked up online how to fix it. Nothing. I tried launching another game from the app. Nothing. Now I am unable to play anything else and my headset is basically broken.To this day I am still stuck in the Netflix app and I could not be more frustrated, confused, and disappointed in this app. Well done Netflix. :(

Unfortunately nothing more. The picture quality is not as good as it should be. Also no option to watch together.
The Idea is great, more than great. But the solution needs fixing

I actually wasn’t expecting much from this port of Netflix. I did expect it to look like it does on psvr, I was pleasantly surprised by being whisked away into a snowy cabin on a bright red couch with a 200 inch tv in front of me. The image is clear and the display on the quest definitely impressed me. When you choose a title to watch the lights in the virtual room you’re in dim at the same time and lends an amazing atmosphere to the whole experience. Very well done Netflix.
The app is nicely designed but the media quality is low. Netflix should update the ridiculous resolution limit.
Uhhhh ya my dad is obsessed with it Mabel to an unhealthy level 😏but all I know is he loves it and I give this app a 10/10 or I should say a 5/5
